waveform.name: Waveform

stories.name: Dynamic Level
All Levels

waveform.description: Simple audio level waveform visualization. Renders animated bars whose height responds to the current audio RMS level. Each bar has a slight random offset for visual variety. Uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth animation — no external dependencies.

reactDocgen.description:
Simple audio level waveform visualization.

Renders animated bars whose height responds to the current audio RMS level.
Each bar has a slight random offset for visual variety. Uses requestAnimationFrame
for smooth animation — no external dependencies.
